questions: What was the consolidated total revenue from operations in FY2023?
What was the net profit for the year FY2023?
What are the major risk factors mentioned in the annual report?
ground_truths: The consolidated revenue from operations was reported in the income statement.
Net profit figures appear in the consolidated income statement.
Risk factors include geopolitical tensions, regulatory changes, and currency risks.
contexts: KPMG Mock Financial Annual Report Financial Year ended March 31, 2023 (FY2023) 1. Executive & Business Overview FinDoc Intelligence mock enterprise operates in global digital services, providing cloud-native integration pipelines and advanced retrieval models. In FY2023, the firm witnessed robust customer adoption driven by the acceleration of enterprise AI intelligence frameworks. Our operations are split into three geographic divisions: North America, Europe, and Asia-Pacific. North America remains our primary market segment, contributing to over 50% of the overall revenue. 2. Financial Statements & Performance In FY2023, the consolidated total revenue from operations stood at n2,40,000 Crore, compared to n2,10,000 Crore in the previous fiscal year, demonstrating a growth of 14.28%. Metric Detail FY2023 (n in Crore) FY2022 (n in Crore) Consolidated Revenue from Operations 2,40,000 2,10,000 Operating Expenses 1,80,000 1,62,000 Operating Profit (EBITDA) 60,000 48,000 Net Profit for the Year 45,000 36,000 Earnings per Share (EPS) in n 150.00 120.00 3. Risk Management & Key Risk Factors Our operations are subject to multiple industry risk factors. Key risk categories include: (cid:127) Geopolitical tensions: Tensions in Eastern Europe and APAC markets could affect global hardware supply chains and inflate energy prices. (cid:127) Regulatory Changes: Stringent data residency rules in Europe might increase compliance cost of Cloud operations. (cid:127) Currency Fluctuations: Rapid shifts in currency valuation between USD and INR present cash conversion hazards. | Metric Detail | FY2023 (n in Crore) | FY2022 (n in Crore) | | ------------------------------------ | ------------------- | ------------------- | | Consolidated Revenue from Operations | 2,40,000 | 2,10,000 | | Operating Expenses | 1,80,000 | 1,62,000 | | Operating Profit (EBITDA) | 60,000 | 48,000 | | Net Profit for the Year | 45,000 | 36,000 | | Earnings per Share (EPS) in n | 150.00 | 120.00 |

answers:
The consolidated total revenue from operations in FY2023 was ₹2,40,000 Crore. 

Source: kpmg_mock_annual_report_fy2023.pdf, Page 1.

The net profit for the year FY2023 was n45,000 Crore. 

Source: kpmg_mock_annual_report_fy2023.pdf, Page 1, Metric Detail FY2023 (n in Crore) 
Net Profit for the Year: 45,000
